data.body: Re-certification against the restored correct description (this ticket was originally closed against a foreign-corrupted description; the description is now restored to the plan the plan-review gate approved). CI evidence for the make-pass criterion: change 692 (crumply-denim-pitbull) is MERGED to main carrying Verified=+1 (clean-env CI: build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions) AND LLM-Review=+1; local make lint + make typecheck green; tests/unit/test_audit_completion_v2.py + tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py::test_pass_close_persists_criteria_record + tests/external/test_completion_pass_live.py all present and green.
